# Swadeshi Solutions

> Restaurant and hotel management platform for Indian businesses — POS, billing (GST-compliant), order management, inventory, KDS, WhatsApp notifications, and analytics for restaurants, QSRs, cloud kitchens, and hotels.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing, and testimonials.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Account access for restaurant owners and staff.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How customer and business data is collected, stored, and shared.
- [Delete Account](/delete-account): Submit an account deletion request.

## Guides

- [How to Integrate Zomato and Swiggy with Your Restaurant POS](/blog/zomato-swiggy-integration): Step-by-step guide to tie up with Swiggy and Zomato and unify orders inside a restaurant billing software.
